data_range.note: Placeholder - needs GitHub PR fetch to populate real data

common_issues.description: Functions don't check if device descriptor or init parameters are NULL before use
When initialization fails partway through, allocated resources are not freed
common_issues.example: Free allocated memory and remove initialized peripherals before returning error

common_issues.description: Functions use |= to aggregate errors, losing specific error codes
common_issues.example: Return first error immediately or track specific errors, not ret |= func()

common_issues.description: Shared state accessed without locks or atomic operations
common_issues.example: Use no_os_mutex for protecting critical sections

common_issues.issue: Magic numbers instead of named constants

common_issues.description: Function parameters not documented in Doxygen comments

common_issues.issue: Variable declaration in middle of function
common_issues.description: Variables declared after executable statements (not C89/C90 compliant)
common_issues.example: Declare all variables at top of function block

common_issues.description: Range validation not performed on numeric parameters
Resources accessed after being freed in cleanup
common_issues.example: Set pointers to NULL after freeing: *dev = NULL;

common_issues.description: Register locks not properly managed, potential security issue
common_issues.example: Track lock state and ensure proper unlock on all paths

note: This is a placeholder based on common embedded driver issues. Run fetch_webpage/githubRepo to populate with real PR data from https://github.com/adi-innersource/no-OS/pulls
